name: Square Casual Traditional Patio End Table Green - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring a blend of modern style and functionality to your outdoor space with this Square Casual Traditional Patio End Table from Room Essentials™. This traditional patio end table features a square shape with a spacious slatted top for resting your drinks, books and other items. The rust-resistant polystyrene tabletop with a powder-coated metal frame promotes lasting outdoor use, while the foldable design makes for easy storage when not in use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
